title: 01963_Image_Clustering_with_External_Guidance
positive_examples: Clustering has a wide range of applications, such as anomaly detection, person re-identification, community detection.
negative_examples: Performance depends on data bias and cannot be guaranteed in more complex real-world applications.
Might bring disturbances in decision-making, especially in areas such as health care, autonomous vehicles.
Requires manually setting the target cluster number, which can be problematic in real-world applications.
